note: The content-and-resolution layer SNG-027 (social contest) leans on but left undefined. A pole-signature is the structured 'what moves this person, what hardens them, what they cannot be budged by' — derived from data NPCs already carry (spectrum/poleIntensity, want, fears, universalRole, roleMethod). It makes approach-FIT computable so a social contest isn't vibes: the same approach lands differently on a truth-culture NPC than a peace-culture one, mechanically. This doc defines the schema, the derivation, and the approach×signature resolution table. Authored by Aevi (PO), closing SNG-027's content gap.

signatureSchema.note: Added to NPC records (or derived on the fly by SNG-022 reconciliation for existing NPCs). All fields optional — the engine falls back to disposition-derived defaults.

fields.movedBy: array of approach-types this person is OPEN to (e.g. ['honor','truth','shared-feeling']). A well-fit approach here gets a FIT bonus.
fields.hardenedBy: array of approach-types that BACKFIRE (e.g. ['deception','pressure','sentiment']). Using one moves the meter the wrong way and/or spends patience.
fields.immovableBy: array of approach-types that simply don't work — no progress, no backfire, wasted beat (e.g. Vaskar immovableBy ['speed','charm','logic-alone']).
fields.onlyMovedBy: OPTIONAL hard gate — a single thing that is the ONLY real lever (e.g. Vaskar onlyMovedBy 'trust-demonstrated-over-time'; nothing else reaches threshold, only slows the loss). Use sparingly, for the immovable-by-design.
fields.patience: how many mis-steps before they disengage (low = touchy, high = will hear you out). Default from personality.patience.
fields.tell: a one-line GM hint surfaced when the player reads them (via Attention/rune-cast/Cold-Read), pointing at movedBy without stating the meter.

approachTypes.desc: appeal to duty, reputation, the right thing by their code
lay out the real situation plainly, hide nothing
meet them in the emotion, feel-with (Pathos)
press a contradiction, argue it airtight (Logos)
expose a lie or hidden thing (Verity)
lower the temperature, make it safe (Stillcraft)
invoke a shared relationship, standing, or history
a concrete trade — coin, favor, service

approachTypes.note: moves truth-cultures, HARDENS peace/falsehood-cultures (the Stillhold) — the signature reversal

approachTypes.desc: demonstrate durable commitment across real time
approachTypes.note: the only lever for the deep-slow (Ents, Vaskar); can't be faked in one beat
moves the weak-willed, HARDENS the disciplined and the proud
works on the credulous, BACKFIRES hard on truth-readers (Verity-users, Vael)

resolution.fitBonus: +15 to the social d100 when the approach is in movedBy (or its pole fits their disposition). Stacks with attribute + ability.
resolution.misfitPenalty: -10 and the meter can move the WRONG way when the approach is in hardenedBy.
resolution.immovableWaste: immovableBy approaches auto-fail the beat with no meter change but a patience spend — the GM narrates the bounce ('he hears you out, unmoved').
resolution.onlyMovedByGate: if set, approaches outside it CANNOT cross the win-threshold — at best they slow the patience-drain; only the named lever actually wins. This is how 'Vaskar takes a century of trust' is real and not just flavor.
resolution.abilityAmplify: a matching Reach ability makes an approach land harder: Pathos+shared-feeling, Logos+proof, Verity+unmasking, Stillcraft+de-escalation, Falsecraft+deception, mediators_tongue+bond/bridge. The ability is the method; the approach is the intent; fit is whether the person is open to it.
resolution.botchReadsFalse: a botched READ (Attention/rune-cast to learn their signature) can report a FALSE lever — the player pursues honor on someone who's actually moved only by shared-feeling, and burns patience. Parallels the rune-cast botch.

worked_examples.tell: He weighs you against a thousand years. Nothing you say today matters as much as what you do across time.
worked_examples.why: The Rootbound elder — Erik's 'trust demonstrated over duration' made mechanical. You literally cannot win him in one conversation; you can only avoid losing ground and earn the right to return.

worked_examples.tell: She turns you from the question with such kindness you almost don't notice. The lever is the thing she's protecting — name it gently.
worked_examples.why: The Stillhold keeper — the-unsayable MOVES her (she secretly wants relief) where it would HARDEN the culture around her. Signature and locale can differ.

worked_examples.tell: She reads a straight answer as respect and a maneuver as insult. Be plain or be gone.
worked_examples.why: The Marcher — deception BACKFIRES hard (she reads it true); honor and plain truth are the road.

worked_examples.tell: Feeling is noise to them. Only a cleaner argument than theirs will move the mind — though the body underneath is another matter.
worked_examples.why: The war-thinker — proof is the only front door; but the hidden lever (their dying body, their subtracted warmth) is reachable another way, a deeper arc.

buildImplication: Adds an optional `poleSignature` object to NPC records; SNG-022 reconciliation derives a default one for existing NPCs from spectrum+want+fears+universalRole. SNG-027's social contest reads it for FIT. Generation (SNG-020) authors a signature for each generated NPC from its disposition+role. Content owed shrinks to: hand-author signatures on the ~dozen major arc-NPCs (the rest derive). This closes SNG-027's 'content owed' — the mechanic is now fully specified end to end.
